public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as liaison.
appearance: Pela Stone usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their liaison status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a liaison still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of liaison in and around Red Hood Guild, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Red Hood Guild workable through the obligations of liaison while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Red Hood Guild, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of liaison visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pela Stone needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Red Hood Guild before trust collapses.
Pela Stone can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Pela Stone read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Red Hood Guild: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

first_impression: Pela Stone presents as Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a liaison still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Liaison, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Pela Stone refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Liaison too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Pela Stone can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Pela Stone adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Pela Stone is Known locally through day-to-day work as liaison. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Liaison.
